modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Remove former employee from Perceptive Content alarm recipients list.

full_description_text:  
The user has identified that a former employee is still listed as a recipient for alarms in Perceptive Content. This situation requires the removal of the individual from the alarm recipients to ensure proper notification management. The request is aimed at maintaining the integrity of the alarm system within the application.
